violations.text: (Steam Table ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Per PIC, a work order was submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

(Ham and cheese sandwiches) was observed held at (47) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
(Serving well) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Per PIC work order was placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Faucet head at 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Observed leakage. System must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Sink and Surface sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink.. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
